function ContractSection({cv, onContractSaved, onPromote}){ const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false); const [showPreview, setShowPreview] = useState(false); const [contract, setContract] = useState(cv.contract||null); const [form, setForm] = useState({ title: cv.contract?.title || 'Arbeitsvertrag', start_date: cv.contract?.start_date || (cv.start_date||new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)), end_date: cv.contract?.end_date || '', duration_months: cv.contract?.duration_months || '12', hourly_rate: cv.contract?.hourly_rate || (cv.Math.round(parseFloat(hourly_rate||0)*parseFloat(work_hours||8)*22)||''), work_hours: cv.contract?.work_hours || (cv.work_hours||'8'), work_model: cv.contract?.work_model || (cv.work_model||'Vor Ort'), project: cv.contract?.project || '', notes: cv.contract?.notes || '', signed: cv.contract?.signed || false, signed_date: cv.contract?.signed_date || '', signed_file: cv.contract?.signed_file || null, }); const set = (k,v) => setForm(f=>({...f,[k]:v})); function saveContract(){ const c = {...form, created_at: new Date().toISOString()}; setContract(c); onContractSaved(c); setShowForm(false); setShowPreview(true); } function handleSignedUpload(e){ const file = e.target.files[0]; if(!file) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = ev => { const updated = {...contract, signed:true, signed_date:new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), signed_file:ev.target.result, signed_filename:file.name}; setContract(updated); onContractSaved(updated); }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function printContract(){ const w = window.open('','_blank','width=800,height=1000'); const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('de-DE'); var html=''+ 'Arbeitsvertrag - '+cv.first_name+' '+cv.last_name+''+ ''+ '
JSR BPO GmbH
'+ '

'+form.title+'

'+ '
Ausgestellt am '+today+'
'+ '

Vertragsparteien

'+ ''+ ''+ ''+ ''+ ''+ '
